text.title: Agile Hybrid Approaches Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping score state to a rule.

conclusion.verdict: score all 6 Boehm + Turner dimensions before recommending

branch.when: dims_complete == true AND evidence_missing == false AND avg >= 0.7
dims_complete == true AND evidence_missing == false AND avg <= 0.3
dims_complete == true AND evidence_missing == false AND avg > 0.3 AND avg < 0.7 AND tilt_unnamed == true

conclusion.verdict: name hybrid tilt with explicit per-workstream boundary

branch.when: dims_complete == true AND evidence_missing == false AND avg > 0.3 AND avg < 0.7 AND tilt_unnamed == false AND triggers_few == true
dims_complete == true AND evidence_missing == false AND avg > 0.3 AND avg < 0.7 AND tilt_unnamed == false AND triggers_few == false

conclusion.verdict: accept decision; commit to version control with sponsor signature
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: dims_complete=true, evidence_missing=false, avg=0.48 (hybrid), tilt_unnamed=false, triggers_few=false → accept decision.
